top_signals.title: Dubai Stocks Set for Best Quarter in a Year as War Premium Ebbs
top_signals.summary: Dubai’s stocks index is set for its best quarter in a year after a truce in the Middle East conflict drew investors back to a market they fled when Iranian missile attacks shattered the city-state’s reputation for stability.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Goldman Backs India 30-Year Bonds as Iran War Impact Contained
top_signals.summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. recommends buying India’s 30-year government bonds as inflation expectations ease and lower oil prices reduce fiscal risks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Kongsberg Has ‘Really Steep’ Demand for Its Missiles, CEO Says
top_signals.summary: Kongsberg has seen a "positive movement forward" in European defense spending throughout last year, even though it’s still not yet at the level needed, its CEO Eirik Lie tells Bloomberg TV. Lie spoke to Bloomberg TV's Francine Lacqua ahead of July's NATO summit in Ankara, Turkey, where European NATO states will be expected to prove they are progressing towards spending 5% of GDP on defense. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Russia's ruling party runs Ukraine war veteran among lead candidates for September election - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Russia's ruling party runs Ukraine war veteran among lead candidates for September election  Reuters

top_signals.title: If you think China needs to dethrone U.S. dollar, you don't understand how it is waging global currency war
top_signals.summary: It's misguided to focus on China's renminbi replacing the U.S. dollar. Beijing is already successfully reducing dependence on a dollar-centric global system.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Britain’s case for meaningful devolution is overwhelming
top_signals.summary: Andy Burnham is right to argue for a shift in power but he has to manage political risk
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: New MiCA regime in Europe, U.S. jobs report for June: Crypto Week Ahead
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: The Ultimate Guide to National Parks, Without the Crowds
top_signals.summary: US national parks are surging in popularity, between America’s 250th celebrations and the increasing demand for domestic travel. Our guide for 16 popular national parks from across the US is here to help you find ways around the crowds. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Some renters say homeownership isn't part of their American Dream: Renting is 'really freeing for me'
top_signals.summary: Some no longer see renting as a temporary stop on the path to homeownership but rather a long-term lifestyle choice, reflecting a shift in the American Dream.
